criteria.name: Topology Pipeline Integration
criteria.rationale: Pipeline includes generation, topology validation, and virtual-node filtering path.

criteria.name: Constraint Completeness in Graph Grammar
criteria.rationale: Grammar contains comprehensive constraints and repair hooks.

criteria.name: Evolutionary Search Correctness
criteria.rationale: Evolution loop and survivor pressure anchors are present.

criteria.name: Descriptor/Realism Pressure Mechanisms
criteria.rationale: Adaptive and target-aware realism pressure mechanisms are implemented.

criteria.name: Topology Validation Redundancy
criteria.rationale: Two complementary validator layers are present.

criteria.name: Regression Test Coverage for Topology Fixes
Reproducibility Instrumentation
criteria.rationale: Robustness probe + mask instrumentation are implemented in benchmark suite.
